To sign up for the OSBK newsletter just visit my website & scroll down to the bottom of the home page. I promise never to spam you but only share exciting news & organizing tip you can implement in your own home. 💕

latestPosts.caption:
The OSBK x SHAQ collab ➡️ 🧺🏀

Casual Tuesday: Organizing Homes & chillin’ with @shaq

The Luxury Move-In Experience by Organizing Spaces By Kim

At Organizing Spaces By Kim, we don’t just organize homes, we curate & manage luxury moves from start to finish.

Moving doesn’t have to feel chaotic. With our concierge moving services, your transition becomes seamless, elevated & even exciting!!

We thoughtfully handle every detail so your life never skips a beat.

Imagine walking into your new home just days after your move, no boxes in sight, every space beautifully organized & everything intentionally placed & ready to be lived in and enjoyed.

Our Full-Service Concierge Moving Experience Includes:

• New home consultation and a customized organizational product design plan
• Pre-move decluttering and preparation
• Coordination with movers and trusted vendors for a fully streamlined experience
• Professional packing with intentional labeling systems
• Full moving day management
• Complete home unpacking
• Aesthetic, functional organization tailored to your lifestyle
• & MORE

Every move and every space is curated specifically for you.

Our trained, background-checked & insured team is known for being some of the kindest & most detail-oriented professionals you’ll ever work with.

With thousands of spaces organized and years of industry experience, we deliver a true white-glove experience, where you won’t have to lift a finger! 

#conciergemove #dallasprofessionalorganizer #rockwallprofessionalorganizer #dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer

Comment MOVE & you’ll automatically get a DM with a link to these products + more info about our Concierge Moving Service. If you don’t see a DM please let me know. 

⚡️Declutter + Pack + Unpack + Organize⚡️

For your next move, YOU NEED US! 

The Organizing Spaces by Kim team can help you DECLUTTER + PACK all your belongings before your relocation. 

Once in your new home we can UNPACK & ORGANIZE your ENTIRE HOME! What would take you months only takes us days. Yes, every since box will be EMPTY and your items will be stored in an organized fashion. 

I know moving can be stressful but that’s why we take that stress off your plate and just make the magic happen. Your transition from your old home to your new home runs a lot smoother with us around. 😉 

If you just want part of this process (example just unpacking + organizing) that is an option too. Let’s chat about how we can make your next move a great one!

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #rockwallprofessionalorganizer #dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer #unpackandorganize #movingspecialist #dallasmoving #dallasmovingservices #dallasmovingexperts

The CEOs behind some of America’s most organized homes.

The mansions.
The transformations.
The high profile clients.
The chaos.
The stories that built it all.

Now we’re taking you behind the scenes.

#professionalorganizer #organizingspaces #pantryorganization

latestPosts.caption:
Comment HOME & you’ll automatically receive a DM with a link to these products. If you don’t see a message, please let us know!

Moving doesn’t have to be stressful, it can actually be exciting. ✨

Our concierge moving service takes care of every detail so you don’t have to. We coordinate, unpack, organize, source and install organizing products, create custom labels in all spaces so your home is completely move-in ready.

From kitchens and pantries to closets, bathrooms, garages, and beyond, we do it all in just days, not months.

Skip the chaos and walk into a home that’s functional, organized, and ready to be lived in. Let us handle your next move. 🤍

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #dallasmovingservices #kitchensofinstagram

Red, white & BUMP is the theme this year! ❤️🤍💙 

This is my second favorite holiday of the year & I love every minute of it.

Our tradition always starts super early with the parade at Mr. Jeff’s house, followed by Destiny’s 4th of July party, a pregnancy-approved nap this year & fireworks to end the night. ✨

It’s hard to believe that next 4th we’ll have our little bundle of baby blue with us. That thought makes this holiday even sweeter. 🇺🇸🩵

Comment MOVE & you’ll automatically receive a DM with a link to these products. If you don’t see a message, please let us know!

Moving is one of life’s most stressful experienceS but WE make it one of the easiest.

Our white glove concierge move is our signature service, and without a doubt, our most requested and favorite experience to provide. We thoughtfully declutter your current home, professionally pack every detail, manage the entire move, then unpack and organize your new home from top to bottom.

The result? You walk into a beautifully organized, move-in ready home from day one, no boxes & no chaos.

We’ve perfected this process through countless moves, so all you have to do is open the door and enjoy. 

Welcome home, the Organizing Spaces By Kim way. 🤍

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #ClosetOrganization #luxuryclosetorganization

Comment CLOSET & you’ll automatically receive a DM with a link to these products. If you don’t see a message, please let us know!

Welcome home. Because you hired us, everything is already in its place.

Moving doesn’t have to end with weeks of living out of boxes.

Our white-glove concierge move management service takes care of every detail, from decluttering and packing your current home to coordinating your move, then unpacking and professionally organizing every space in your new home.

Before you arrive, we’ll even stock the essentials like toilet paper, paper towels, toothbrushes, soap, pantry staples, and other everyday necessities, so your home is truly ready to live in from day one.

You don’t unpack. You don’t organize. You simply walk through the door, settle in, and enjoy your new home.

That’s the Organizing Spaces By Kim concierge move experience! 

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #ClosetOrganization #luxuryclosetorganization

If there’s 1️⃣ space we could organize over & over again, it’s a pantry. 

After 7 years and hundreds of pantry makeovers, we’ve mastered the process. What could take you days of sorting, purging, and organizing, our team can often knock out in just a day!

Functional. Beautiful. Every time.

A beautifully organized pantry is more than just labels and containers, it’s a space designed to make everyday life easier.

Whether you’re moving into a new home or refreshing your current one, we create luxurious, highly functional pantries tailored to your lifestyle.

Moving soon? Our white-glove concierge moving services can handle everything from packing and coordinating the move to unpacking, organizing, and stocking your new pantry. Prefer to be more involved? We can customize our services to fit your needs.
